name: Bad Ending Party - The Final Piece (1st Edition)
description:
"Better be on your P and Q, it's just me, Jay Rock, Soul, and Q / Solar system and barbecue, nothing else you can do"

- Kendrick Lamar, Rigamortus (2011)

So... I never intended on releasing this early. However, a lack of motivation to make anything Calypso-related until I introduce him in Redemption and a lack of literally any other characters to make (I'll get to Brugo, don't worry) has forced my hand, so now I'm making this. The basic gist of this bot is... well you're the final piece of the puzzle. The party comes to you and asks you to join their party. This takes place right after the encounter with Prince Jinguis.

No personal yap here, but I just thought I'd let yall know that BEP:R Chapter 1 has finally released! I won't be putting future releases in the descriptions of my bots unless it's the end of a major arc, so if you wanna keep up-to-date, follow my WattPad (link in my bio). I'm putting a lot of effort into writing Redemption, so I'd really appreciate the support.

READ BOT DEFINITION FOR FIRST MESSAGE
creator: the_speedymanguything
